name: SHAPE elamipretide healthy-aging pilot is recruiting
summary: A small open-label elamipretide pilot has moved cardiolipin-targeted mitochondrial therapy into a healthy-aging older-adult study, but it has no posted efficacy results.
significance_note: Useful for surveillance because it is a direct older-adult healthy-aging mitochondrial trial, but the single-arm design and lack of results prevent outlook movement.
